---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something Pancetta should do
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

## What you're trying to do

The user-facing problem. Skip implementation details — what does the
operator want to accomplish?

## Why it matters

How often does this come up? What's the current workaround? Who else
benefits?

## Sketch

If you have an idea for the shape of the solution (config flag, new
TUI key, new command, new crate), describe it. If not, that's fine —
leave this section blank.

## Out of scope

Anything you specifically don't want as part of this change.
